name: Jordan Lee

goals.primary: Decide between the IC vs manager path within 9 months
secondary: Pilot people management via a temporary backfill or by mentoring 1–2 interns
Advance technical depth toward Staff IC if staying IC
Reduce context switching and improve prioritization during the platform migration

current_projects: Event ingestion reliability initiative (Kafka to SQS migration)
Internal developer platform enhancements (golden paths and paved roads)
specific_dilemma: Choosing the IC vs manager path
constraints: On-call every 6 weeks, heavy pages during migration
Two kids under 5; best meeting windows Tue/Thu 11:30–13:00 ET
Prefer initial asks capped at 15–20 minutes

mentorship_preferences.ask_size: Small, specific questions scoped to 15–20 minutes
mentorship_preferences.selection_criteria: Mentors 2–5 steps ahead, accessible (medium/high), not celebrities

if_manager: Comfort running effective 1:1s and performance feedback
Ability to shield the team and prioritize amidst platform migration
Energy level after 4–6 weeks of temporary EM backfill
if_ic: Progress toward Staff IC scope: cross-team influence, key technical decisions
Reduced pages and improved stability for ingestion pipeline
Mentoring juniors without formal people management
